headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Brown & Brown (BRO) Spotlighting AI Strategy Amid Mixed Insurance-Sector Signals
summary: In late April 2026, Brown & Brown announced it would release its first-quarter earnings and host an investor call highlighting how it uses technology, data and artificial intelligence to support customers, while investors and analysts weighed mixed sector commentary, recent fund exits and updated expectations for the business. Amid recognition as a Best Workplace in Canada and discussion of softer property and casualty pricing, the company’s culture, profitability and insurance-cycle...
